message:
perf(search): Pre-compute lowercase query terms for cache filtering (Opt 2.4)

Add QueryTermsLower struct to avoid repeated to_lowercase() calls when
filtering cached hits. The query is lowercased and tokenized once, then
reused for all hits in the filter loop.

Changes:
- Add QueryTermsLower struct with pre-computed tokens and bloom mask
- Add hit_matches_query_cached_precomputed() for batch operations
- Update hot path in search() to use pre-computed terms
- Add 7 unit tests for QueryTermsLower functionality

Before: O(n) to_lowercase() calls where n = cached hits to filter
After: O(1) to_lowercase() call per search query

Expected improvement: 5-15% faster cache filtering for queries with
many cached hits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
